executive_summary.verdict: T is a pure dividend play. Stable DCF, Lynch=0 (no growth expected). 6%+ yield for income investors.
executive_summary.key_insight: DCF $28 vs Price $17 = 65% upside. High yield (6%+) makes it attractive for income.

graham.recommendation: Graham not applicable - negative book from divestitures

peter_lynch.recommendation: Lynch = 0 because no growth expected. This is an income play, not growth.

5Y.analysis: DCF stable at $25-30 range. Price crashed from $30 to $17.

10Y.analysis: DCF has been remarkably stable for a decade.

dcf.recommendation: 65% below DCF - significant upside for a telecom

dividend_analysis.history: Consistent payer after dividend cut in 2022
dividend_analysis.sustainability: HIGH - telecom cash flows are predictable

bull_case.thesis: Undervalued dividend machine. Debt paydown improves equity value.

bear_case.thesis: Debt burden too heavy. Competition erodes margins.
